inline_comments.message: This can lead to some unexpected behavior in the future. As the original intention of the code and what isAssignableFrom seems to be different.

The sonar message on this error : 
There is no requirement that class names be unique, only that they be unique within a package. Therefore trying to determine an object's type based on its class name is an exercise fraught with danger

But you are right, isAssignableFrom is not the same that before. I propose a new version that fix the sonar bug and add a junit test.
